subcodes.first_line: O ye heavenly friends! The education of children, both male and female, is among the mightiest foundations of this wondrous Cause and momentous Announcement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی تربیت اطفال ذکور و اناث از اعظم اساس این امر بدیع و نبا عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @House of Justice
